project.name: private-ai-roleplay
project.description: A privacy-first, browser-based AI roleplay application.

nodes.name: App.tsx
nodes.summary: Root React component pinned to viewport via fixed positioning. Orchestrates Header, Sidebar, ChatArea, SettingsModal, CharacterEditor, and AboutModal.

nodes.name: App
nodes.summary: Default exported React component composing all UI sections with fixed viewport layout.

nodes.name: AboutModal.tsx
nodes.summary: Informational modal covering privacy, BYOK, OOC directives, session export, and API key best practices.

nodes.name: AboutModal
nodes.summary: Default exported component displaying privacy education with OOC usage instructions.

nodes.name: CharacterEditor.tsx
nodes.summary: Modal for creating/editing custom AI roleplay characters with auto-generated system prompt preview.

nodes.name: CharacterEditor
nodes.summary: Editor component with create/edit/delete for custom characters.

nodes.name: Header.tsx
nodes.summary: Sticky application header with sidebar toggle, title, model badge, and API key status indicator.

nodes.name: Header
nodes.summary: Sticky header component with responsive text and toggle controls.

nodes.name: SettingsModal.tsx
nodes.summary: API key configuration modal with masked display, dynamic version number from package.json, and privacy notice.

nodes.name: SettingsModal
nodes.summary: Settings modal with API key input and dynamic app version display.

nodes.name: Header.test.tsx
nodes.summary: Unit tests for Header component.

nodes.name: main.tsx
nodes.summary: Application entry point creating React root and mounting App component.

nodes.name: apiKeyStore.test.ts
nodes.summary: Unit tests for API key Zustand store.

nodes.name: uiStore.test.ts
nodes.summary: Unit tests for UI Zustand store including about modal state.

nodes.name: apiKeyStore.ts
nodes.summary: Zustand store holding DeepSeek API key exclusively in browser memory.

nodes.name: useApiKeyStore
nodes.summary: Exported Zustand hook for API key state.

nodes.name: uiStore.ts
nodes.summary: Zustand store for global UI state: sidebar, settings, character editor, about modal toggles.

nodes.name: useUIStore
nodes.summary: Exported Zustand hook for all UI modal toggle actions.

nodes.name: builtIn.ts
nodes.summary: Four built-in roleplay characters with personality profiles and rules.

nodes.name: CharacterSelector.tsx
nodes.summary: Character selection dropdown listing built-in and custom characters with edit button.

nodes.name: CharacterSelector
nodes.summary: Character selection component with dropdown and custom character edit trigger.

nodes.name: Sidebar.tsx
nodes.summary: Collapsible sidebar with overlay on mobile, character selection, new chat, custom character, session export/import, and About button. Exports via chatCharacterId lookup.

nodes.name: Sidebar
nodes.summary: Sidebar component with mobile overlay, auto-close on actions, and export via chatCharacterId.

nodes.name: config.ts
nodes.summary: API base URL constant from Vite environment variable.

nodes.name: characterStore.test.ts
nodes.summary: Unit tests for character Zustand store covering CRUD and selection.

nodes.name: chatStore.test.ts
nodes.summary: Unit tests for chat store covering sendMessage, OOC directives, editing, chatCharacterId, and export.

nodes.name: characterStore.ts
nodes.summary: Zustand store for character state: merges built-in and custom, CRUD, selection, and system prompt retrieval.

nodes.name: useCharacterStore
nodes.summary: Exported Zustand hook for character management.

nodes.name: chatStore.ts
nodes.summary: Core chat store: SSE streaming with 120s timeout, OOC instruction accumulation, message editing with branching, chatCharacterId tracking, context trimming, and session export.

nodes.name: useChatStore
nodes.summary: Exported Zustand hook providing all chat state and actions.

nodes.name: uuid.ts
nodes.summary: Lightweight UUID v4 generator for unique identifiers.

nodes.name: v4
nodes.summary: Generates RFC 4122 v4 UUID using Math.random.

nodes.name: character.ts
nodes.summary: Character interface: id, name, description, personality, scenario, systemPrompt, greeting, isBuiltIn.

nodes.name: message.ts
nodes.summary: Message interface with id, role, content, timestamp, and optional occ flag for OOC directives.

nodes.name: session.ts
nodes.summary: SessionExport interface for versioned conversation export with character and messages.

nodes.name: contextManager.test.ts
nodes.summary: Tests for context trimming and token estimation.

nodes.name: promptBuilder.test.ts
nodes.summary: Tests for system prompt construction.

nodes.name: sessionIO.test.ts
nodes.summary: Tests for session export/import with 5MB size cap and validation.

nodes.name: contextManager.ts
nodes.summary: Context window trimming preserving system messages and first user message.

nodes.name: trimMessages
nodes.summary: Trims messages to token limit preserving system and first user message.

nodes.name: estimateTokens
nodes.summary: Character-based token count estimation.

nodes.name: estimateTotalTokens
nodes.summary: Total token estimation across message array.

nodes.name: promptBuilder.ts
nodes.summary: Constructs system prompts from character attributes and roleplay rules.

nodes.name: buildSystemPrompt
nodes.summary: Builds system prompt from Character object with rules.

nodes.name: buildSystemPromptFromParts
nodes.summary: Builds system prompt from individual string parts.

nodes.name: sessionIO.ts
nodes.summary: Session JSON export/download and import/upload with 5MB size cap and schema validation.

nodes.name: exportSession
nodes.summary: Creates Blob download for session JSON export.

nodes.name: importSession
nodes.summary: Validates and parses uploaded session JSON file.

nodes.name: ChatArea.tsx
nodes.summary: Chat view container conditionally rendering MessageList/Composer or EmptyState.

nodes.name: ChatArea
nodes.summary: Chat area component composing message display and input.

nodes.name: EmptyState.tsx
nodes.summary: Welcome screen when no character is selected.

nodes.name: MessageComposer.tsx
nodes.summary: Chat input with auto-resize, OOC detection, editing pre-fill, cancel button, and auto-focus after streaming.

nodes.name: MessageComposer
nodes.summary: Chat input component with OOC and editing support.

nodes.name: MessageList.tsx
nodes.summary: Scrollable message display with amber OOC styling via bubbleStyle helper, edit button, and rehype-sanitize markdown.

nodes.name: MessageList
nodes.summary: Message list with OOC-aware bubble styling and edit controls.

nodes.name: StreamingMessage.tsx
nodes.summary: Streaming message with sanitized markdown and blinking cursor.

nodes.name: EmptyState.test.tsx
nodes.summary: Unit test for EmptyState component.

nodes.name: deploy.yml
nodes.summary: GitHub Actions CI/CD workflow: triggers on push to main, installs deps, runs tests, builds frontend with VITE_API_BASE_URL, removes generated .wrangler config, and deploys Worker via wrangler.

nodes.name: CLOUDFLARE.md
nodes.summary: Compact deployment guide for Cloudflare Workers: API token creation, authentication, deploy commands, architecture, and troubleshooting.

nodes.name: README.md
nodes.summary: Project overview with live demo link, architecture, features including OOC and editing, quick start, deployment, and MIT license.

nodes.name: SPEC.md
nodes.summary: Full technical specification: objectives, architecture, privacy, features, UI, data models, API contract, and acceptance criteria.

nodes.name: index.html
nodes.summary: HTML entry point for Vite-built React app with dark theme.

nodes.name: package.json
nodes.summary: Root package manifest: React 19, Zustand, react-markdown, Vite, Vitest, Tailwind, ESLint, Prettier, Wrangler.

nodes.name: tsconfig.json
nodes.summary: TypeScript config with strict mode, JSX, ESNext, bundler resolution.

nodes.name: tsconfig.node.json
nodes.summary: TypeScript config for Node build tooling with composite references.

nodes.name: worker/package.json
nodes.summary: Worker sub-package manifest with wrangler and vitest dev deps.

nodes.name: worker/tsconfig.json
nodes.summary: TypeScript config for CF Worker targeting ES2022.

nodes.name: worker/wrangler.toml
nodes.summary: Wrangler deployment config with zero persistence bindings.

nodes.name: eslint.config.js
nodes.summary: ESLint flat config with TypeScript, React hooks, and Prettier.

nodes.name: postcss.config.js
nodes.summary: PostCSS config with Tailwind CSS v4 and Autoprefixer.

nodes.name: index.css
nodes.summary: Global Tailwind stylesheet with dark theme and prose typography.

nodes.name: test-setup.ts
nodes.summary: Test environment setup with jest-dom matchers.

nodes.name: vite-env.d.ts
nodes.summary: Vite environment type declarations including VITE_API_BASE_URL and VITE_APP_VERSION.

nodes.name: vite.config.ts
nodes.summary: Vite config with React, Tailwind, Cloudflare plugin, API proxy, and dynamic version injection from package.json.

nodes.name: vitest.config.ts
nodes.summary: Vitest config with jsdom, globals, and CSS module support.

nodes.name: index.test.ts
nodes.summary: Integration tests for Worker API proxy, CORS, validation, and error handling.

nodes.name: worker/src/index.ts
nodes.summary: Stateless Cloudflare Worker relay: POST /api/chat to DeepSeek with 8192 max_tokens streaming, zero persistence.

nodes.name: jsonResponse
nodes.summary: Helper for standardized JSON responses with CORS.

nodes.name: worker/vitest.config.ts
nodes.summary: Vitest config for Worker tests with workerd runtime.

layers.name: UI Components
layers.description: React components: chat interface, character selection, sidebar with mobile overlay, message editing, OOC amber styling, settings, about modal, and global CSS.

layers.name: State Management
layers.description: Zustand stores: API key, character CRUD, chat with SSE/OOC/editing/chatCharacterId, and UI modals with about toggle.

layers.name: Types & Data Models
layers.description: TypeScript interfaces for Character, Message (with occ flag), Session, plus built-in character definitions.

layers.name: Utilities
layers.description: System prompt builder, context token trimming, session I/O with 5MB cap, and UUID generation.

layers.name: Entry Points & Bootstrap
layers.description: App root, entry point, API config, Vite/Vitest/ESLint/PostCSS tooling, HTML entry, type declarations, and dynamic version injection.

layers.name: Cloudflare Worker Backend
layers.description: Stateless relay proxy: POST /api/chat → DeepSeek with 8192 max_tokens streaming, zero persistence.

layers.name: Tests
layers.description: Unit and integration tests for components, stores, utilities, and Worker API proxy.

layers.name: Project Configuration & Documentation
layers.description: Package manifests, TypeScript configs, docs (README, SPEC, CLOUDFLARE), CI/CD pipeline, and MIT license.

tour.title: Project Overview
tour.description: Start with the README and package manifest to understand the privacy-first AI roleplay app and its full dependency stack.

tour.title: Application Entry
tour.description: index.html and main.tsx bootstrap React. App.tsx uses fixed viewport layout to orchestrate all UI sections.

tour.title: Type System & Characters
tour.description: Character, Message (with occ flag), and Session interfaces define the domain. builtIn.ts provides four roleplay characters.

tour.title: State Management
tour.description: Four Zustand stores: apiKey (browser memory), character (CRUD), chat (SSE+OOC+editing+timeout+chatCharacterId), and UI (modals).

tour.title: Chat Interface
tour.description: ChatArea composes EmptyState/MessageList/MessageComposer. OOC messages render in amber. Edit button enables backtrack-and-branch.

tour.title: Sidebar & Modals
tour.description: Sidebar with mobile overlay, character selector, session I/O, and About button. AboutModal covers privacy, BYOK, OOC usage, and API key best practices.

tour.title: Utilities
tour.description: promptBuilder constructs system prompts, contextManager trims to token limits, sessionIO handles export/import with 5MB cap, uuid generates IDs.

tour.title: Cloudflare Worker Backend
tour.description: Stateless relay proxy: POST /api/chat → DeepSeek with 8192 max_tokens streaming. wrangler.toml confirms zero persistence.

tour.title: Testing & CI/CD
tour.description: Tests cover stores, utilities, components, and Worker. GitHub Actions auto-deploys on push to main after passing tests.

tour.title: Build & Deployment
tour.description: Vite/Tailwind/ESLint configs wire up the build. SPEC.md is the technical spec, CLOUDFLARE.md the deployment guide. Dynamic version from package.json.
